title: Fluorescence Measurement Protocol

steps.title: Prepare 5 ml LB medium with antibiotic resistance and 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 5 ml LB medium with antibiotic resistance and 0.5% ml Tergitol

steps.title: Inoculate one colony in the prepared LB medium
steps.instruction: Inoculate one colony in the prepared LB medium

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.01-1 mM of the desired fatty acid to the culture medium

steps.title: Inoculate the culture for at least...
steps.instruction: Inoculate the culture for at least 16 hours at 37 °C

steps.title: Measure the absorption with a photometer...
steps.instruction: Measure the absorption with a photometer at a wavelength 600 nm

steps.title: Dilute the culture to an OD 600 of 0
steps.instruction: Dilute the culture to an OD 600 of 0.05 with LB medium

steps.title: Fill a 24 well plate with...
steps.instruction: Fill a 24 well plate with 800 µl of 3 biological with 3 technically replicats respectively like shown in the table below

steps.title: Inoculate the 24 well plate at...
steps.instruction: Inoculate the 24 well plate at 37°C for at least 16 hours

steps.title: Transfer the samples from the 24...
steps.instruction: Transfer the samples from the 24 well plate on a 96 well plate like shown in the table below

steps.instruction: Measure the desired fluorescence at the appropriate wavelenght and the OD 600 with a plate reader
